_comment: 示例一：一个配置文件训练一个独立模型 / Example 1: one config file trains one independent model

experiment._comment: 模型身份、语言和启动方式；name 自动决定 datasets/runs/artifacts 目录 / Model identity, languages and initialization; name automatically determines datasets/runs/artifacts directories
experiment.name: model_1
experiment._comment_languages: 内置可选 zh/en/ja/ko/de/fr/ru/pt/es/it；顺序决定 language ID / Built-ins: zh/en/ja/ko/de/fr/ru/pt/es/it; order defines language IDs

initialization._comment: scratch=从零训练，resume=续训，expand_speakers=增加音色 / scratch=new model, resume=continue training, expand_speakers=add voices

text_generation._comment: 默认自动生成少量流程验证文本；产品训练请关闭并提供人工审核 CSV / Generates a small smoke-test corpus by default; disable it and provide reviewed CSV text for production

generation._comment: Qwen 样本生成；enabled=false 时使用自己准备的 WAV/metadata / Qwen sample generation; set enabled=false to use your own WAV/metadata

voice._comment: design 使用文字描述设计音色 / design creates a voice from a natural-language description
voice.speaker: voice_01
voice.prompt: A warm, natural adult voice with clear pronunciation, medium pitch, steady pace, and calm friendly delivery.
voice.reference_text: Hello, this is the reference voice used to create a consistent multilingual speaker.

training._comment: 常用微调参数；显存不足时先降低 batch_size / Common tuning options; reduce batch_size first when GPU memory is insufficient

validation._comment: 自动留出验证集并导出最佳模型；通常只需调整 fraction / Automatically hold out validation data and export the best model; normally only tune fraction

quality._comment: 基础信号质检默认开启且不下载模型；semantic=true 时需先安装 quality extra 并下载 ASR/声纹模型 / Signal checks are model-free; semantic=true requires the quality extra and explicit ASR/speaker model downloads
